'''Rob Spicer''' was a professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played for the [[Dewsbury Rams]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]]. He played as a {{rlp|wg|CE|SR}} or {{rlp|LF}}.<ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org">{{cite web|url=http://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/Rob-Spicer/summary.html|title=Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org|publisher=rugbyleagueproject.org|date=31 December 2011|accessdate=1 January 2012}}</ref>

He has previously played at club level for [[Stanley Rangers]], the [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]], the [[York City Knights]] and the [[Dewsbury Rams]].
